concepts.title: Group representations
concepts.blurb: A representation realizes group elements as linear operators, translating group questions into linear algebra.

concepts.title: Characters and orthogonality
concepts.blurb: Character theory packages traces of representations and gives powerful decomposition formulas.

concepts.title: Induction and symmetric-group combinatorics
concepts.blurb: Induction, restriction, and Young diagrams organize families of representations and branching laws.
